steps.title: Find what weakens the student's claim
steps.content: To weaken the claim that emotionality is unrelated to box office success, we need evidence that emotionality does predict earnings.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice B states emotionality score was a positive predictor of box office earnings. Choices A, C, and D either don't directly link emotionality to box office earnings or ignore emotionality altogether. That matches choice B — B is correct.
